productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Check Green Shirt
description: Style NoteThis shirt from the US Polo Collection is crafted from soft cotton fabric and has a contemporary cut that offers a flattering silhouette. Team it with crisp chinos and leather shoes or jeans and sneakers paired with classy accessories for that perfect look.Product DetailsChecked green shirt with grey accents, has a cut away collar, has a full buttoned placket, a flap pocket on both sides of the chest, embroidery on the left chest, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
